acquisition method: data-dependent acquisition was undertaken with a single Orbitrap MS scan
cleavage agent: allowing a maximum of two missed cleavages. Cleavage specificity was set to “SEMI‐N_TERM” and “TrypsinR” (Arg‐C)
enrichment method: we immunoprecipitated LE28‐labeled lysates with a legumain‐specific antibody
fractionation method: Online fractionation by high‐FAIMS and mass spectrometry (MS) analysis
fragmentation method: followed by Orbitrap MS/MS HCD scans of precursors
instrument: infused into an OrbiTrap Fusion Lumos mass spectrometer
labeling: We applied 16‐plex TMTpro labeling to facilitate simultaneous quantification
